title: Cobblemon Crafted Edition
description: Cobblemon Crafted Editon promises an unparalleled adventure where the synergy of these mods offers an immersive and exciting Cobblemon/Vanilla+ experience.
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/773128731d097a8d2fabbde85c4647ca98224126.png)

**# About This Modpack:**

Embark on an epic journey into the world of Cobblemon Odyssey, a thrilling Minecraft modpack that seamlessly merges the beloved universe of Pokémon with the limitless creativity of Minecraft! Immerse yourself in a pixelated adventure where the familiar landscapes of Minecraft are teeming with Pokémon waiting to be discovered, trained, and battled.

**# Note:**

This modpack does not own Cobblemon, any issues with the Cobblemon mod please go directly to the official cobblemon discord
